# zabbix_trigger (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix trigger by `id`, or by `description` + exactly one of `host_id`/`template_id`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Lookup by ID
data "zabbix_trigger" "by_id" {
  id = "12345"
}

# Lookup by description scoped to a host
data "zabbix_trigger" "by_host" {
  description = "High CPU utilization"
  host_id     = "10084"
}

# Lookup by description scoped to a template
data "zabbix_trigger" "by_template" {
  description = "High CPU utilization"
  template_id = "10085"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `description` (String) Name of the trigger. Used with `host_id` or `template_id` for scoped lookup.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the host to scope the lookup. Used with `description`.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the trigger. One of `id` or (`description` + scope) must be set.
- `template_id` (String) ID of the template to scope the lookup. Used with `description`.

### Read-Only

- `comments` (String) Additional description/comments.
- `expression` (String) Trigger expression.
- `manual_close` (Boolean) Whether the problem can be manually closed.
- `priority` (String) Severity of the trigger.
- `recovery_expression` (String) Recovery expression.
- `recovery_mode` (String) Recovery mode.
- `status` (String) Monitoring status of the trigger.
- `tags` (Attributes Set) Tags attached to the trigger. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `url` (String) URL associated with the trigger.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `value` (String) Tag value.
